horoscope: Early today, you're inclined not to think too far ahead of yourself just for the time being, dear Aries, and this kind of breather from serious thought can be exactly what you need to come back at things later more refreshed. You can be in the kind of mood that favors taking care of the people you love. You enjoy good timing and a satisfying feeling that comes with pacing yourself. You'll feel a little more productive as the day advances, although not always focused! Activities that involve editing can be a strong draw. Chiron moves out of your sign today, and while it still isn't finished with you (it will return for several months starting in September), it's on its way out as it transitions into your resources sector. You'll be connecting with your need to create a safe, sound, comfortable world for yourself and your loved ones.

Chiron enters your sign today, dear Taurus, and while this transit will be a long-term one, sticking with you for 7-8 years, it's not until April 2027 before it's consistently in your sign. As such, you're getting a sneak-peek now and until September. There is a lot of work on the horizon involving healing and improving your image, body, self-confidence, and manner in the coming years. Chiron brings out your unique and special qualities for all to see, and you will learn to follow your own inner guidance and instincts more intently. You’re entering an exceptionally creative stage of growth as you identify, face, and attempt to resolve and heal areas of damage. This is about embracing your uniqueness, and it’s bound to be empowering! Today, you're seeking a healthy escape from the usual fare, and emotional refreshment is easier to find than usual.

You may get a nice boost from sharing ideas with others or supporting a friend today, dear Gemini. Early today, communications are personal, warm, and supportive. You’ll find that people are generally cooperative and not especially demanding or judgmental. A good mood and positive vibes about the future contribute to your productivity, and you’re especially willing to work for something you believe in. While the need for extra mental stimulation and activity continues, by late morning you're more inclined to pull back from contact just enough to regain your emotional center. Still, people seek you out for help or support.

You can frequently seek comfort and nourishment from time to yourself, some level of withdrawal or anonymity, and private time these days, dear Cancer. Fortunately, circumstances may be such that you're more able to do so. You might also think about the past very frequently, which could be a necessary process as you grow and learn how to use quiet time to your advantage and for better emotional health. Today is strong for enjoying the rewards of recent accomplishments and considering or setting new goals. You should be careful not to burn yourself out later today, however, when it's difficult to focus. The Moon's move into your communication sector late morning begins a theme that emphasizes an emotional need to reach out, learn, connect, and understand.

You may get the chance to pursue a particular interest now, dear Leo, or there can be an opportunity to enjoy a change of scenery. People are cooperative, and you seek out more peaceful ways of relating with others early today. You may be giving helpful guidance as a means of showing your affection. You are both optimistic and realistic now, which is a wonderful place to be mentally. The Moon continues to transit your sign and stir your need to be acknowledged until late morning, after which you're inclined to settle down and work on building your resources. You can be especially resourceful right now, making the most of the least, or the most of what you have.

The Moon moves out of your privacy sector and into your sign late morning, dear Virgo, and this begins a new lunar cycle for you. Focusing on yourself and what you've been missing in recent weeks is appropriate now. This transit is energizing on an emotional level. Your mood is strong, as you're especially in touch with your feelings, but given to fluctuations. Energies are strong, however, for making plans for work and special projects as the day advances. Chiron makes a big move today, as it pulls into your spirit sector and into harmony with your sign. This is a sneak peek of a transit that will ultimately stick with you for many years. You'll be connecting with and learning to trust your unique vision of the world.

Early today is a good time for considering the other side of the coin and weighing the pros and cons, dear Libra. You can feel especially good about building something up or working towards a long-term goal, and this optimism boosts your productivity. A partner or good friend may offer up some ideas, strategies, and possibilities. It's also a fine time to clear the air or to discuss an emotional conflict or problem with someone you trust. The Moon moves into the background in your solar chart, however, and you might similarly seek some anonymity, alone time, or extra rest. You're listening to your heart and making more room for healing and emotional nourishment.

Taking care of business continues to be a strong focus today until late morning, dear Scorpio, when you're more inclined to seek company and focus on your relationships rather than your practical affairs. You need some recreation and perhaps a little pampering, but you also need to get things done to feel fulfilled right now. Nurturing and developing a business, career, or project can be satisfying. Chiron moves into your solar seventh house today, offering a sneak peek of a transit that will ultimately stick with you for many years. It's a time for exploring your need for partnership more deeply. Relationships, especially one-on-one, committed, or partnership connections, are likely to be sources of much inspiration and, frequently, areas of great transformation and important life lessons.

The Moon continues to encourage your more adventurous and curious nature early today, dear Sagittarius, but later moves into your solar tenth house. Responsibilities and material priorities can come into stronger focus. You can find a nice balance between growth or improvement and simplicity today. It’s a good time for feeling a sense that you can realize your goals and dreams. You can be motivated to get the job done. You are a little more ambitious, and this fuels your motivation. Chiron's move into your solar sixth house today places greater emphasis on healing and wellness in the period ahead.

You continue an introspective, observant cycle until mid-morning today, dear Capricorn, when you take more interest in experiencing life and taking action. There can be a bit of urgency to your emotions later today, but also a strong desire to get closer to someone. Knowing that rushing could lead to problems later, you might focus on doing things right. Chiron moves into harmony with your sign today, and it's a sneak-peek transit of an energy that will ultimately stick with you for many years. Fortunately, it's supportive, and helps you connect with your creative spirit more heartfully.

Early today holds good energy for harmonizing, sharing ideas, and ironing out differences, dear Aquarius. With motivation levels increasing, you’re bound to feel more energized. The more achievable your goals seem, the more willing you are to put effort into working towards them. Business or career prospects seem to be very promising, but improvements may be realized in your personal relationships as well. You’re appreciating a feeling of security and comfort with others. The Moon continues to emphasize partnerships and companionship today, but from mid-morning forward, you're inclined to be a little more selective concerning your involvement with others, preferring deeper connections and subject matter. Taking better care of debts and money matters could be on your mind. Whether debts are material or emotional/spiritual, having a plan for repaying what you might owe can feel good.

This can be a good time for getting to the heart of a complex emotional situation, dear Pisces, whether this is your own situation or if you are helping someone. Others are naturally more cooperative with you early today. You can feel a special kind of satisfaction in taking care of your practical affairs. A feeling of well-being grows as you handle your daily affairs. Chiron moves into your solar third house today, beginning its sneak-peek transit that will ultimately stick with you for many years. Fortunately, it's a supportive energy that motivates you to explore your need for better connection and communication. You'll be engaged in a significant journey of healing wounds tied to your unique early experiences of communicating, learning, sharing, and connecting.
